overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking from a wooden cabin past a campfire with an NPC, then ascending a grassy hillside as weather transitions from sunny to a dramatic storm, encountering a horseback rider along the way.

events.description: character moves from alongside the wooden cabin into the open campfire clearing
character stops walking and stands near the campfire

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path beside a wooden cabin, then approaching and stopping at a campfire where an NPC is seated on a bench

notable_agents.action: sitting on a wooden bench near the campfire, facing the flames

entered.detail: weathered wooden homestead building with stacked firewood along the exterior wall
rustic wooden post fence running alongside the dirt path
smoking campfire with stones arranged around the fire pit
large grey boulder situated near the campfire area
simple wooden bench where the NPC is seated
small wooden structure visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path beside a weathered wooden cabin with a rustic fence, transitioning into an open clearing with a smoking campfire. An NPC sits on a wooden bench near the fire as the character approaches and stops, with a large boulder and distant cabin visible in the background.

events.description: character resumes walking and begins ascending the grassy hillside away from the campfire
storm clouds gather overhead and sky begins to darken significantly

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up a grassy hillside path, moving through open terrain with scattered trees as the weather begins to turn

entered.detail: round hay bale sitting in the tall grass beside the path
large solitary tree with spreading branches on the hillside
expansive view of the valley becoming visible as the character climbs

segments.scene_description: Leaving the campfire behind, the character ascends a grassy hillside along a dirt trail, passing a hay bale and a large solitary tree. The landscape opens up to reveal a valley overlook in the distance while storm clouds begin gathering overhead, darkening the sky.

events.description: sky becomes dark and overcast as storm arrives, dramatically reducing light levels
rider on horseback appears on the path and passes by the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the stormy landscape, passing a rider on horseback heading in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the path, passing by the character heading in the opposite direction

entered.detail: dark grey storm clouds covering the sky and blocking sunlight
expansive grassy valley visible below the hillside path

segments.scene_description: The scene transforms as dark storm clouds cover the sky, casting the landscape in shadow. The character continues along the hillside trail overlooking the expansive prairie valley below, encountering a rider on horseback who passes by heading in the opposite direction through the stormy weather.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet rustic homestead that gradually transforms into a dramatic, storm-swept hillside. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path beside a weathered wooden cabin and fence, moving into an open clearing where an NPC sits by a smoking campfire. As the character leaves the fire behind, the camera ascends a grassy hillside trail past a hay bale and a solitary tree, while the bright sky begins to darken with gathering storm clouds. The scene then shifts into a moody, shadowed landscape as the clouds fully cover the sky, overlooking an expansive prairie valley. Finally, the character continues along the ridge through the worsening weather, encountering a rider on horseback passing in the opposite direction.
